input.user_input: Add a cure period of 15 business days to the breach provision in Section 6. Right now it allows immediate termination with no opportunity to cure.

actual: I would be happy to add the 15-business-day cure period to Section 6. However, it looks like you haven't uploaded or provided the document yet. Please upload or share the document, and I will make the necessary edits to the breach provision right away.
